thread.body:
Hi Greg,

Thank you again for the quick reply last week. I'm sorry we missed connecting during your earlier Tue/Wed window.

We're still interested in El Gaucho for a private client dinner with a ~1-hour documentary screening ("Retirement Everest") for about 30–40 guests (~35 midpoint), flexible evening late July or August 2026.

Could we:
1) Rebook a short call this week (I'm flexible — suggest 2–3 times that work for you), and/or
2) If easier by email first, share the private dining F&B minimum for a room that fits ~35 with AV for a short film, plus any room/AV fees and service charge?

Our ideal F&B minimum for this series is at or under $3,000. If El Gaucho's private min is higher, please still share it so we can decide quickly.

Direct: 971-570-2438. Please reply to this email (jonray757@gmail.com).

Thank you,
John Harris
Senior Retirement Strategist
Harris Assurance Group / Black Sand Capital Group
971-570-2438
jonray757@gmail.com

thread.subject: Banquet room inquiry — dinner + documentary for ~35 guests
thread.body:
Hi there,

We're hosting a private client education dinner paired with a ~1-hour documentary screening ("Retirement Everest") for about 30–40 guests (planning midpoint ~35) on a flexible evening in late July or August 2026 (start ~5:30–6:00pm).

For this first event we're targeting a practical mid-tier budget — ideally roughly $45–70 per guest all-in for food & beverage including typical service (not a steakhouse buyout). If you have a private or strong semi-private room that can support a short film (screen/projector or large display + reliable Wi-Fi) and dinner, we'd love:

1) Room options that fit ~35
2) Food & beverage minimum (or per-person package pricing)
3) Service charge / gratuity / admin fees and any room fee
4) AV options and fees for a ~1-hour film screening
5) Available dates late July–August 2026
6) Sample menus

Please reply to this email (jonray757@gmail.com). Phone if easier: 971-570-2438.

I saw your banquet room packages (including published ~$35 per guest options and room F&B minimums). Please confirm which room fits ~35 for an evening event with a short film, and the exact minimum + package for that setup.

If this inbox is not monitored for banquets, please forward to the right person or call me at 971-570-2438. Your SE Madison banquet line is listed as (503) 235-5123.

Thank you,
John Harris
Senior Retirement Strategist
Harris Assurance Group / Black Sand Capital Group
971-570-2438
jonray757@gmail.com

thread.subject: Re: The Cove private dinner + screening — dates & AV
thread.body:
Hi Brianna,

Thank you for the detailed note, banquet menu, and room photos — very helpful.

We're interested in the full second floor for ~30–40 guests (midpoint ~35) with a ~1-hour documentary screening ("Retirement Everest") before dinner.

A few next details:

1) Could you check availability for a few Sun–Thu evenings (closed Mondays noted) in late July and August 2026? Prefer start around 5:30–6:00pm. Please share any open dates you recommend.
2) Confirm the $3,000 F&B minimum applies for those weeknights, plus 20% gratuity and 4% admin.
3) For the film: the 60" rolling TV may work for a smaller group — for ~35, we may bring a portable screen/projector. Is that OK, and is Wi-Fi reliable in the private room?
4) LOI + $600 deposit process and what we need to send to soft-hold a date.

Please reply to this email (jonray757@gmail.com). Cell if easier: 971-570-2438.

Thank you,
John Harris
Senior Retirement Strategist
Harris Assurance Group / Black Sand Capital Group
971-570-2438
jonray757@gmail.com

Hi Kayla,

thread.subject: Private dinner + short film for 30–40 — mid-tier group inquiry
thread.body:
Hi there,

We're hosting a private client education dinner paired with a ~1-hour documentary screening ("Retirement Everest") for about 30–40 guests (planning midpoint ~35) on a flexible evening in late July or August 2026 (start ~5:30–6:00pm).

For this first event we're targeting a practical mid-tier budget — ideally roughly $45–70 per guest all-in for food & beverage including typical service (not a steakhouse buyout). If you have a private or strong semi-private room that can support a short film (screen/projector or large display + reliable Wi-Fi) and dinner, we'd love:

1) Room options that fit ~35
2) Food & beverage minimum (or per-person package pricing)
3) Service charge / gratuity / admin fees and any room fee
4) AV options and fees for a ~1-hour film screening
5) Available dates late July–August 2026
6) Sample menus

Please reply to this email (jonray757@gmail.com). Phone if easier: 971-570-2438.

Thank you,
John Harris
Senior Retirement Strategist
Harris Assurance Group / Black Sand Capital Group
971-570-2438
jonray757@gmail.com

thread.subject: Private dining inquiry — dinner + short film for 30–40 guests
thread.body:
Hi there,

We're hosting a private client education dinner paired with a ~1-hour documentary screening ("Retirement Everest") for about 30–40 guests (planning midpoint ~35) on a flexible evening in late July or August 2026 (start ~5:30–6:00pm).

For this first event we're targeting a practical mid-tier budget — ideally roughly $45–70 per guest all-in for food & beverage including typical service (not a steakhouse buyout). If you have a private or strong semi-private room that can support a short film (screen/projector or large display + reliable Wi-Fi) and dinner, we'd love:

1) Room options that fit ~35
2) Food & beverage minimum (or per-person package pricing)
3) Service charge / gratuity / admin fees and any room fee
4) AV options and fees for a ~1-hour film screening
5) Available dates late July–August 2026
6) Sample menus

Please reply to this email (jonray757@gmail.com). Phone if easier: 971-570-2438.

Thank you,
John Harris
Senior Retirement Strategist
Harris Assurance Group / Black Sand Capital Group
971-570-2438
jonray757@gmail.com
